Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal

Class DefaultUser

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal.AbstractUserManagementItem
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal.DefaultUser
All Implemented Interfaces:
TenantSpecificItem, User, UserManagementItem, Serializable
public class DefaultUser extends AbstractUserManagementItem implements User

    • getGroups

      public Collection<Group> getGroups()
      Description copied from interface: User
      Returns the groups the user is a member of. Groups will be loaded on-demand by default. When loading the groups fails, this method throws a runtime-exception of type com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector.exception.LazyLoadingException.
      Specified by:
      getGroups in interface User
      Returns:
      groups this user is a member of
